'''toyalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiose|labiose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-y-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiose|labiose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| toyalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyalithi|toyalithi]] || [[word:toyaliji|toyaliji]] || [[word:toyalishi|toyalishi]] || [[word:toyaliki|toyaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyaluthuthu|toyaluthuthu]] || [[word:toyalujuju|toyalujuju]] || [[word:toyalushushu|toyalushushu]] || [[word:toyalukuku|toyalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyaluthu|toyaluthu]] || [[word:toyaluju|toyaluju]] || [[word:toyalushu|toyalushu]] || [[word:toyaluku|toyaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyalufthuf|toyalufthuf]] || [[word:toyalufjuf|toyalufjuf]] || [[word:toyalufshuf|toyalufshuf]] || [[word:toyalufkuf|toyalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyalethe|toyalethe]] || [[word:toyaleje|toyaleje]] || [[word:toyaleshe|toyaleshe]] || [[word:toyaleke|toyaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyalothotho|toyalothotho]] || [[word:toyalojojo|toyalojojo]] || [[word:toyaloshosho|toyaloshosho]] || [[word:toyalokoko|toyalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyalotho|toyalotho]] || [[word:toyalojo|toyalojo]] || [[word:toyalosho|toyalosho]] || [[word:toyaloko|toyaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyalofthof|toyalofthof]] || [[word:toyalofjof|toyalofjof]] || [[word:toyalofshof|toyalofshof]] || [[word:toyalofkof|toyalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfthÃŸf|toyalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfjÃŸf|toyalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfshÃŸf|toyalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfkÃŸf|toyalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|toyalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|toyalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|toyalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|toyalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfthÃŸf|toyalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfjÃŸf|toyalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfshÃŸf|toyalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfkÃŸf|toyalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfthÃŸf|toyalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfjÃŸf|toyalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfshÃŸf|toyalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:toyalÃŸfkÃŸf|toyalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:toyalÃḊthÃḊ|toyalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:toyalÃḊjÃḊ|toyalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:toyalÃḊshÃḊ|toyalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:toyalÃḊkÃḊ|toyalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:toyalathatha|toyalathatha]] || [[word:toyalajaja|toyalajaja]] || [[word:toyalashasha|toyalashasha]] || [[word:toyalakaka|toyalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:toyalatha|toyalatha]] || [[word:toyalaja|toyalaja]] || [[word:toyalasha|toyalasha]] || [[word:toyalaka|toyalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:toyalafthaf|toyalafthaf]] || [[word:toyalafjaf|toyalafjaf]] || [[word:toyalafshaf|toyalafshaf]] || [[word:toyalafkaf|toyalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:toyalasha|toyalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:toyalshÃḋsha|toyalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:toyalrosha|toyalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:toyalmusha|toyalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:toyalyasha|toyalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotoyalnkshÃḋsha|gotoyalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotoyalnkrosha|gotoyalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotoyalnkmusha|gotoyalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotoyalnkyasha|gotoyalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:toyayalasha|toyayalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:toyayalshÃḋsha|toyayalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:toyayalrosha|toyayalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:toyayalmusha|toyayalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:toyayalyasha|toyayalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotoyayalnkshÃḋsha|gotoyayalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotoyayalnkrosha|gotoyayalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotoyayalnkmusha|gotoyayalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotoyayalnkyasha|gotoyayalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:teyÃḊlasha|teyÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:teyÃḊlshÃḋsha|teyÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:teyÃḊlrosha|teyÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:teyÃḊlmusha|teyÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:teyÃḊlyasha|teyÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goteyÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|goteyÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goteyÃḊlnkrosha|goteyÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goteyÃḊlnkmusha|goteyÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goteyÃḊlnkyasha|goteyÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:toyfalasha|toyfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:toyfalshÃḋsha|toyfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:toyfalrosha|toyfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:toyfalmusha|toyfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:toyfalyasha|toyfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gotoyfalnkshÃḋsha|gotoyfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gotoyfalnkrosha|gotoyfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gotoyfalnkmusha|gotoyfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gotoyfalnkyasha|gotoyfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
